hostedClusterSpec has wrong casing — Go exported types must use UpperCamelCase (HostedClusterSpec)
DNS_Resolver should use Go MixedCaps naming (no underscores)
JSON tag should use camelCase (dnsResolver) not snake_case (dns_resolver)
optional field should use +optional marker and pointer type (*string) if zero value and nil have different meaning
Go doc comment should start with the field name
missing validation markers for IP address field
DNSConfig should not be a pointer — use value type with omitzero instead
clusterID immutability rule needs ratcheting guard — must use oldSelf.has(field) to handle existing objects where the field was not yet present
consider consolidating DNS fields into a single struct or extending existing DNSSpec
missing N-1/N+1 serialization compatibility tests
missing envtest coverage for CEL validation rules
